headline: RTX (NYSE:RTX) Valuation Check After Mixed Short Term Returns And Backlog Growth
summary: RTX stock overview after recent performance moves RTX (RTX) closed at approximately $192.90, with a 1-day return of 3.07% and a roughly flat move over the past week. Over the past month, the stock shows a 4.80% decline, while the past 3 months reflect a 5.18% gain. See our latest analysis for RTX. That recent 3.07% 1 day share price move comes after a mixed few months, with the 30 day share price return in negative territory but a 1 year total shareholder return of 47.65% signalling stronger...
